---
title: "HABS analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(miceadds)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggplot2)
library(lavaan)
library(semPlot)
library(cocor)
library(car)
library(corrplot)
library(semptools)
library(effectsize)
library(gridExtra)
library(gamm4)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggExtra)
```

```{r}
plotit <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label, ymin, ymax, color_choice) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_point(size = 2, stroke = 1, alpha = 0.3, color = color_choice) +
    geom_line(aes(group = Med_ID), lty = 2, alpha = 0.1, color = "black") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = color_choice, size = 0.5, lty = 1, aes(group = Med_ID)) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    ylim(ymin, ymax) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),  
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)  
    )
}
plotit2 <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label, ymin, ymax, color_choice, n_highlight = 100, seed = 716) {
  set.seed(seed)
  highlight_ids <- sample(unique(data$Med_ID), n_highlight)
  data$highlight <- data$Med_ID %in% highlight_ids
  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_line(data = subset(data, !highlight), aes(group = Med_ID), alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.3, color = color_choice) +
    geom_line(data = subset(data, highlight), aes(group = Med_ID), alpha = 1, linewidth = 0.5, color = color_choice) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(ymin, ymax)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 16)
    )
}
plotcross <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label, ymin, ymax, color_choice) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_point(size = 0.7, stroke = 1, alpha = 1, color = color_choice) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 1, lty = 1) +
    # geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2), se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 1, lty = 1) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    ylim(ymin, ymax) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),  
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16)  
    )
}
plot_outliers <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label, ymin, ymax, outliers, color_choice) {
  outlier_CCIDs <- unique(outliers$Med_ID)
  data <- data %>%
    mutate(is_outlier = ifelse(Med_ID %in% outlier_CCIDs, TRUE, FALSE))
  non_outlier_data <- data %>%
    filter(!is_outlier)
  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_point(aes(color = is_outlier, alpha = is_outlier), size = 2, stroke = 1) +
    geom_line(aes(group = Med_ID), lty = 2, alpha = 1, color = "black") +
    geom_smooth(
      data = non_outlier_data,
      aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]]),
      method = "lm", se = FALSE, size = 0.8, lty = 1, color = "black"
    ) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    ylim(ymin, ymax) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("TRUE" = "green", "FALSE" = color_choice),
      labels = c("TRUE" = "Outlier", "FALSE" = "Non-Outlier")
    ) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 1), guide = "none") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.box = "horizontal",
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12), 
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16)
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL))
}
label_mahalanobis_outliers <- function(data, id_col, variables, flag_col_name = "outlier_flag") {
  data_matrix <- data[, variables]
  dists <- mahalanobis(
    data_matrix,
    colMeans(data_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
    cov(data_matrix, use = "complete.obs")
  )
  is_outlier <- dists > qchisq(0.975, df = length(variables))
  outlier_ids <- data[[id_col]][is_outlier]
  data[[flag_col_name]] <- ifelse(data[[id_col]] %in% outlier_ids, "Outlier", "Normal")
  return(data)
}
```

```{r}
brain_data <- read.csv("COMBAT_data/HABS_data_longCombatCorrected.csv") 
cog_data   <- read.csv("COG_data/HABS_gCog_data_g_derived.csv") 

mydata     <- merge(brain_data, cog_data, by = c("Med_ID", "Visit_ID"))

names(mydata)[names(mydata) == "mean_MeanThickness_thickness.combat"] <- "MeanThk.combat"
names(mydata)[names(mydata) == "mean_WhiteSurfArea_area.combat"]      <- "MeanSfA.combat"

cols <- gsub("\\.x$", "", grep("\\.x$", names(mydata), value = TRUE))

for (cn in cols) {
  y_col <- paste0(cn, ".y")
  if (y_col %in% names(mydata)) mydata[[y_col]] <- NULL
  x_col <- paste0(cn, ".x")
  if (x_col %in% names(mydata)) names(mydata)[names(mydata) == x_col] <- cn
}
```

#Pattern-mixture allocation 
```{r}
subject_patterns <- mydata %>%
  group_by(Med_ID) %>%
  summarize(
    wave0 = as.integer(any(Visit_ID == 1)),
    wave1 = as.integer(any(Visit_ID == 2)),
    wave2 = as.integer(any(Visit_ID == 3)),
    wave3 = as.integer(any(Visit_ID == 4)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pattern = paste0(wave0, wave1, wave2, wave3),
    pattern_group = case_when(
      pattern %in% c("1110", "1010", "1100") ~ "G1",
      pattern %in% c("1111", "1101", "1001", "1011") ~ "G2", 
      TRUE ~ "Other" 
    )
  )

subject_patterns %>% count(pattern) %>% arrange(desc(n))
mydata <- mydata %>% left_join(subject_patterns %>% select(Med_ID, pattern_group, pattern), by = "Med_ID")
sapply(split(mydata$Med_ID, mydata$pattern_group), function(x) length(unique(x)))

summary_table <- aggregate(dA ~ pattern_group, data = mydata, 
                           FUN = function(x) c(count = length(x),
                                               mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
                                               min = min(x, na.rm = TRUE),
                                               max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE)))

summary_table <- do.call(data.frame, summary_table)
names(summary_table) <- c("pattern_group", "count", "mean_dA", "min_dA", "max_dA")
summary_table
```
### CROSS-SECTIONAL ANALYSIS 
#Descriptive statistic of the sample 
```{r}
mydata_cross <- mydata[mydata$Visit_ID == 1, ]
mydata_cross <- mydata[mydata$Visit_ID == 1 & mydata$CS == "CU", ]

length(unique(mydata_cross$Med_ID))

length(unique(mydata_cross$Med_ID))
length(unique(mydata_cross$Med_ID))
cat("Cross-sectional age summary (A0_raw):\n")
print(summary(mydata_cross$Age))
cat("Cross-sectional sex:\n")
print(table(factor(mydata_cross$Sex, levels = c(1, 0), labels = c("Female", "Male"))))
print(table(factor(mydata[mydata$Visit_ID == 1, ]$Ethnicity, levels = c("Black", "Hispanic", "White", " "), labels = c("Black", "Hispanic", "White", "unknown"))))
```

## Mediation models
### Outliers
```{r}
mydata_cross <- label_mahalanobis_outliers(
  data = mydata_cross,
  id_col = "Med_ID",
  variables = c("gCog0", "MeanThk.combat", "MeanSfA.combat", "A0", "Sex", "YoE"),
  flag_col_name = "outlier_flag"
)
all_outliers_cross <- data.frame(Med_ID = mydata_cross$Med_ID[mydata_cross$outlier_flag == "Outlier"])

mydata_cross[mydata_cross$Med_ID %in% all_outliers_cross$Med_ID, setdiff(names(mydata_cross), "Med_ID")] <- NA
mydata_cross <- mydata_cross[!is.na(mydata_cross$gCog0), ]
mydata_cross$gCog <- mydata_cross$gCog0

vars_to_scale <- c("Age", "Sex", "YoE", "MeanThk.combat", "MeanSfA.combat", "gCog")
mydata_cross[vars_to_scale] <- scale(mydata_cross[vars_to_scale])
```
#### Correlation matrix (final dataset)
```{r}
corr_vars <- mydata_cross[, c("Age", "gCog", "MeanThk.combat", "MeanSfA.combat", "Sex")]
colnames(corr_vars) <- c("Age","COG (g)", "THK", "SA", "Sex")
matrix    <- cor(corr_vars)
testRes   <- cor.mtest(corr_vars, conf.level = 0.95)
png("Figures/corrmat_withoutYOE_HABS.png", width = 6, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
cormat    <- corrplot(matrix, method = 'number', p.mat = testRes$p, sig.level = 0.05, 
                      order = 'original', type = "lower", diag = FALSE, tl.col = "black")
dev.off()
corr_vars <- mydata_cross[, c("Age", "gCog", "MeanThk.combat", "MeanSfA.combat", "Sex", "YoE")]
colnames(corr_vars) <- c("Age","COG (g)", "THK", "SA", "Sex", "YoE")
matrix    <- cor(corr_vars)
testRes   <- cor.mtest(corr_vars, conf.level = 0.95)
png("Figures/corrmat_withYOE_HABS.png", width = 6, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
cormat    <- corrplot(matrix, method = 'number', p.mat = testRes$p, sig.level = 0.05, 
                      order = 'original', type = "lower", diag = FALSE, tl.col = "black")
dev.off()
names(mydata_cross) <- gsub("MeanThk.combat", "Thickness", names(mydata_cross))
names(mydata_cross) <- gsub("MeanSfA.combat", "Area", names(mydata_cross))
```

### SEM1 (without YoE)
```{r}
SEM1 <- '
  gCog0  ~ c1*Age + b1*Thickness + b2*Area + c2*Sex
  
  Thickness  ~ a1*Age 
  Area       ~ a2*Age 
  Area       ~ Sex
  
  Thickness ~~ Area

  ATC := abs(a1 * b1)  
  ASC := abs(a2 * b2)  
  ABC := ATC + ASC     
  
  Age_total := ABC + abs(c1)
  
  ATC_prop := ATC / Age_total
  ASC_prop := ASC / Age_total

'
SEM_fit1 <- sem(SEM1, data = mydata_cross)
summary(SEM_fit1, fit.measures=TRUE, std = TRUE)

# custom_layout <- matrix(c(
#    0,   2,   
#   -1,   1,    
#    1,   1, 
#   -1,   0 ,
#    1.7, 1
# ), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE) # [1] "gCog0" "Thickness" "Area"  "Age"  "Sex" 
# 
# semPaths(SEM_fit1,what = "std", layout = custom_layout, edge.label.cex = 1.3, label.cex = 1,
#                       sizeMan = 10, residuals = FALSE, intercepts = FALSE, nCharNodes = 0, title = FALSE,
#                       mar = c(4, 4, 4, 4))

SEM1_equated_age <- '
  gCog0 ~ c1*Age + b1*Thickness + b1*Area + c2*Sex 

  Thickness ~ a1*Age 
  Area      ~ a1*Age 
  Area      ~ Sex
  
  Thickness ~~ Area 
  
  ATC := a1 * b1
  ASC := a1 * b1
  ABC := abs(ATC) + abs(ASC)
'
SEM_fit1_age_equated    <- sem(SEM1_equated_age, data = mydata_cross)
anova(SEM_fit1, SEM_fit1_age_equated)
```
### SEM2 (with YoE)
```{r}
SEM2 <- '
  gCog  ~ c1*Age + b1*Thickness + b2*Area + c2*Sex + c3*YoE
  
  Thickness  ~ a1*Age 
  Area       ~ a2*Age 
  
  Area       ~ Sex
  YoE        ~ Area
  
  Thickness ~~ Area

  ATC := abs(a1 * b1)  
  ASC := abs(a2 * b2)  
  ABC := ATC + ASC     
  
  Age_total := ABC + abs(c1)
  
  ATC_prop := ATC / Age_total
  ASC_prop := ASC / Age_total

'
SEM_fit2 <- sem(SEM2, data = mydata_cross)
summary(SEM_fit2, fit.measures=TRUE, std = TRUE)

# custom_layout2 <- matrix(c(
#    0,    2,   
#   -1,    1,    
#    1,    1, 
#    1.7,  2,
#   -1,    0,  
#    1.7,  1
# ), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE) 
# semPaths(SEM_fit2,what = "std", layout = custom_layout2, edge.label.cex = 1.3, label.cex = 1,
#                       sizeMan = 10, residuals = FALSE, intercepts = FALSE, nCharNodes = 0, title = FALSE,
#                       mar = c(4, 4, 4, 4))

SEM2_equated_age <- '
  gCog ~ c1*Age + b1*Thickness + b1*Area + c2*Sex + c3*YoE

  Thickness ~ a1*Age 
  Area      ~ a1*Age 
  
  Area      ~ Sex
  YoE       ~ Area
  
  Thickness ~~ Area 
  
  ATC := a1 * b1
  ASC := a1 * b1
  ABC := abs(ATC) + abs(ASC)
    
  Age_total := ABC + abs(c1)
  
  ATC_prop := ATC / Age_total
  ASC_prop := ASC / Age_total
'
SEM_fit2_age_equated  <- sem(SEM2_equated_age, data = mydata_cross)
anova(SEM_fit2, SEM_fit2_age_equated)
```

### LONGITUDINAL ANALYSIS 
#### Derive slopes
```{r}
mydata_long <- subset(mydata, pattern_group %in% c("G1", "G2"))
mydata_long <- mydata_long[mydata_long$CS == "CU", ]
# mydata_long$Visit_ID <- as.numeric(as.character(mydata_long$Visit_ID))
# 
# global_vars <- c("MeanThk.combat", "MeanSfA.combat")
# 
# roi_thk_vars  <- grep("^mean_.*_thickness.combat$", names(mydata_long), value = TRUE)
# roi_area_vars <- grep("^mean_.*_area.combat$",      names(mydata_long), value = TRUE)
# 
# roi_vars <- c(roi_thk_vars, roi_area_vars)
# all_vars <- c(global_vars, roi_vars)
# 
# for (v in all_vars) {
# 
#   mydata_long[[paste0(v, "_A0")]] <-
#     residuals(lmer(
#       as.formula(paste0(v, " ~ 1 + (1|Med_ID)")),
#       data = mydata_long, REML = TRUE
#     ))
# 
#   mydata_long[[paste0(v, "_A0dA")]] <-
#     residuals(lmer(
#       as.formula(paste0(v, " ~ A0:dA + (1|Med_ID)")),
#       data = mydata_long, REML = TRUE
#     ))
# 
#   mydata_long[[paste0(v, "_gamm")]] <-
#     residuals(
#       gamm(
#         as.formula(paste0(v, " ~ s(Age)")),
#         data = mydata_long,
#         random = list(Med_ID = ~1),
#         REML = TRUE
#       )$gam,
#       type = "response"
#     )
# }
# 
# split_by_id <- split(mydata_long, mydata_long$Med_ID)
# split_by_id <- split_by_id[sapply(split_by_id, nrow) > 1]
# 
# slope <- function(df, y) {
#   as.numeric(coef(lm(as.formula(paste0(y, " ~ dA")), data = df))["dA"])
# }
# 
# get_visits <- function(df, var) {
#   out <- rep(NA_real_, 4)
#   idx <- match(1:4, df$Visit_ID)
#   out[!is.na(idx)] <- df[[var]][idx[!is.na(idx)]]
#   out
# }
# 
# results <- lapply(names(split_by_id), function(sid) {
#   d  <- split_by_id[[sid]]
#   w0 <- d[which.min(d$dA), ]
# 
#   global_slopes <- c(
#     gCog_slope_A0    = slope(d, "gCog_A0"),
#     gCog_slope_A0dA  = slope(d, "gCog_A0dA"),
#     gCog_slope_gamm  = slope(d, "gCog_gamm"),
# 
#     Thickness_slope_A0    = slope(d, "MeanThk.combat_A0"),
#     Thickness_slope_A0dA  = slope(d, "MeanThk.combat_A0dA"),
#     Thickness_slope_gamm  = slope(d, "MeanThk.combat_gamm"),
# 
#     Area_slope_A0    = slope(d, "MeanSfA.combat_A0"),
#     Area_slope_A0dA  = slope(d, "MeanSfA.combat_A0dA"),
#     Area_slope_gamm  = slope(d, "MeanSfA.combat_gamm")
#   )
#   roi_slopes <- unlist(lapply(roi_vars, function(v) {
#     name <- sub("^mean_(.*)\\.combat$", "\\1", v)
#     c(
#       setNames(slope(d, paste0(v, "_A0")),    paste0(name, "_slope_A0")),
#       setNames(slope(d, paste0(v, "_A0dA")),  paste0(name, "_slope_A0dA")),
#       setNames(slope(d, paste0(v, "_gamm")),  paste0(name, "_slope_gamm"))
#     )
#   }))
# data.frame(
#   Med_ID = sid,
# 
#   as.list(global_slopes),
#   as.list(roi_slopes),
# 
#   Thickness_baseline = w0$MeanThk.combat,
#   Area_baseline      = w0$MeanSfA.combat,
#   gCog_baseline      = w0$gCog0,
# 
#   as.list(setNames(get_visits(d, "MeanThk.combat"), paste0("Thickness", 0:3))),
#   as.list(setNames(get_visits(d, "MeanSfA.combat"), paste0("Area", 0:3))),
#   as.list(setNames(get_visits(d, "gCog0"),          paste0("gCog", 0:3))),
# 
#   Sex = w0$Sex,
#   YoE = w0$YoE,
#   A0  = w0$A0,
# 
#   pattern_group = w0$pattern_group,
#   Ethnicity     = w0$Ethnicity,
#   CS            = w0$CS
# )
# })
# mydata_slopes <- do.call(rbind, results)
# 
# write.csv(mydata_slopes,"COG_data/HABS_brain_cog_slopes.csv",row.names = FALSE)

```
#### Outliers 
```{r}
mydata_slopes <- read.csv("COG_data/HABS_brain_cog_slopes.csv")
mydata_slopes <- mydata_slopes[mydata_slopes$CS == "CU", ]

mydata <- mydata[mydata$Med_ID %in% mydata_slopes$Med_ID, ]
ethnicity_colors <- c("Hispanic" = "orange", 
                      "White" = "lightblue", 
                      "Black" = "purple")

p <- ggplot(mydata, aes(x = dA, y = Age, group = Med_ID, color = Ethnicity)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.1, linewidth = 0.4) +  # Lines connecting points for each person
  geom_point(alpha = 1, size = 0.7) +        # Individual observations
  scale_color_manual(values = ethnicity_colors) +
  labs(x = "Time lag between assessments (years)",
       y = "Age",
       title = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p

p_dist <- ggMarginal(p, type = "density", margins = "y", 
                     groupColour = TRUE, groupFill = TRUE,
                     alpha = 0.2)

p_dist

ggsave("Figures/individual_trajectories_by_ethnicity_HABS.png", plot = p_dist, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```


```{r}
m_re <- lmer(gCog0 ~ scale(A0) + scale(A0):dAZ + scale(prac) + (dAZ|Med_ID), data = mydata_long, REML = TRUE)
mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_ranef <- ranef(m_re)$Med_ID[, "dAZ"]

m_re_thk <- lmer(MeanThk.combat ~ scale(A0) + scale(A0):dAZ + (dAZ|Med_ID), data = mydata_long, REML = TRUE)
mydata_slopes$Thickness_slope_ranef <- ranef(m_re_thk)$Med_ID[, "dAZ"]

m_re_sa <- lmer(MeanSfA.combat ~ scale(A0) + scale(A0):dAZ + (dAZ|Med_ID), data = mydata_long, REML = TRUE)
mydata_slopes$Area_slope_ranef <- ranef(m_re_sa)$Med_ID[, "dAZ"]

# plotcross(mydata_slopes, "Thickness_slope_A0", "gCog_slope_A0", "GM Thickness Change Rate", "Cognition Change Rate", min(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), max(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), color_choice = "darkorange")
# plotcross(mydata_slopes, "Area_slope_A0", "gCog_slope_A0", "GM Area Change Rate", "Cognition Change Rate", min(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), max(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0),  color_choice = "turquoise4")

mydata_slopes <- label_mahalanobis_outliers(data = mydata_slopes, id_col = "Med_ID", variables = c("Thickness_slope_A0", "Area_slope_A0", "Sex", "YoE", "gCog_slope_A0", "A0"), flag_col_name = "outlier_flag_thick")

all_outliers <- data.frame(Med_ID = mydata_slopes$Med_ID[mydata_slopes$outlier_flag_thick == "Outlier"])

outlier_thickness_plot <- plot_outliers(mydata_slopes, "Thickness_slope_A0", "gCog_slope_A0", 
                                        "Thickness Change Rate", "'g' Change Rate", 
                                         min(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), 
                                         max(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), 
                                         all_outliers, "darkorange")

outlier_area_plot      <- plot_outliers(mydata_slopes, "Area_slope_A0", "gCog_slope_A0", 
                                        "Surface Area Change Rate", "'g' Change Rate", 
                                        min(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), 
                                        max(mydata_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), 
                                        all_outliers, "turquoise4")

grid.arrange(outlier_thickness_plot, outlier_area_plot, ncol = 2)

mydata_slopes[mydata_slopes$Med_ID %in% all_outliers$Med_ID, setdiff(names(mydata_slopes), "Med_ID")] <- NA
HABS_slopes <- mydata_slopes
slope_cols <- grepl("slope", names(HABS_slopes))
HABS_slopes[slope_cols] <- scale(HABS_slopes[slope_cols])

thickness_plot <- plotcross(HABS_slopes, "Thickness_slope_A0", "gCog_slope_A0", "THK change rate", "COG (g) change rate", min(HABS_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), max(HABS_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), color_choice = "darkorange")
area_plot <- plotcross(HABS_slopes, "Area_slope_A0", "gCog_slope_A0", "SA change rate", "COG (g) change rate", min(HABS_slopes$gCog_slope_A0), max(HABS_slopes$gCog_slope_A0),  color_choice = "turquoise4")

png("Figures/THK_SA_COG_corr_HABS.png", width = 16, height = 8, units = "in", res = 300)
grid.arrange(thickness_plot, area_plot, ncol = 2)
dev.off()
```
##Univariate mixed-effects models
```{r}
mydata_long <- mydata_long[!mydata_long$Med_ID %in% all_outliers$Med_ID, ]
names(mydata_long)[names(mydata_long) == "MeanThk.combat"] <- "Thickness"
names(mydata_long)[names(mydata_long) == "MeanSfA.combat"] <- "Area"

Interaction <- (mydata_long$dA - mean(mydata_long$dA)) * (mydata_long$A0 - mean(mydata_long$A0))
OrthInteraction <- residuals(lmer(Interaction ~ dA + A0 + (1|Med_ID), data = mydata_long))

thickness_m <- lmer(Thickness ~ A0 + dA + OrthInteraction + (1|Med_ID), data=mydata_long)
area_m      <- lmer(Area      ~ A0 + dA + OrthInteraction + (1|Med_ID), data=mydata_long)

# thickness_m <- lmer(Thickness ~ A0 + dA*pattern_group + OrthInteraction + (1|Med_ID), data=mydata_long)
# area_m      <- lmer(Area      ~ A0 + dA*pattern_group + OrthInteraction + (1|Med_ID), data=mydata_long)

standardize_parameters(thickness_m)
standardize_parameters(area_m)

extract_lmer_summary <- function(model, model_name) {
  sm  <- summary(model)$coefficients
  std <- standardize_parameters(model)
  eta <- eta_squared(model, partial = TRUE)

  keep <- c(
    "A0",
    "dA",
    "OrthInteraction"
    # grep("^dA:pattern_group", rownames(sm), value = TRUE)
    # grep("^dA:CS", rownames(sm), value = TRUE)
  )

  as.data.frame(sm) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Predictor") %>%
    filter(Predictor %in% keep) %>%
    left_join(
      std %>%
        filter(Parameter %in% keep) %>%
        select(Parameter, Std_Coefficient),
      by = c("Predictor" = "Parameter")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      eta %>%
        filter(Parameter %in% keep) %>%
        select(Parameter, Eta2_partial),
      by = c("Predictor" = "Parameter")
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      Model = model_name,
      Predictor,
      beta     = round(Estimate, 4),
      beta_std = round(Std_Coefficient, 3),
      eta2_p   = round(Eta2_partial, 3),
      p        = sub("^0\\.", ".", sprintf("%.3f", `Pr(>|t|)`))
    )
}
final_table <- bind_rows(
  extract_lmer_summary(thickness_m, "Thickness"),
  extract_lmer_summary(area_m,      "Area")
)
final_table %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Trajectories age-related",
    subtitle = "Thickness, Area"
  ) %>%
  fmt_markdown(everything()) %>%
  opt_table_outline() %>%
  opt_all_caps()
```
## Change-Change models 
```{r}
mydata_slopes <- mydata_slopes[mydata_slopes$CS == "CU", ] # Uncomment to repeat analysis on healthy only
adjustments <- c("A0", "A0dA", "gamm", "ranef")

model_grid <- expand.grid(adj = adjustments, 
                          measure = c("Thickness", "Area"),
                          stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

models_simple <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(model_grid)), function(i) {
  adj <- model_grid$adj[i]
  m   <- model_grid$measure[i]
  yvar <- paste0("gCog_slope_", adj)
  xvar <- paste0(m, "_slope_", adj)
  fml <- as.formula(paste(yvar, "~", xvar))
  lm(fml, data = HABS_slopes)
})
names(models_simple) <- paste0("m_", model_grid$measure, "_", model_grid$adj)

results_simple <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(names(models_simple), function(nm) {

    m  <- models_simple[[nm]]
    sm <- summary(m)$coefficients

    eta2 <- summary(m)$r.squared  # correct for simple lm

    data.frame(
      model     = nm,
      predictor = rownames(sm),
      beta      = sm[, "Estimate"],
      p         = sm[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
      eta2      = c(NA, eta2),  # intercept gets NA
      row.names = NULL
    )
  })
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(predictor != "(Intercept)")


final_table <- results_simple %>%
  mutate(
    Adjustment = case_when(
      grepl("_A0$", model)   ~ "A0",
      grepl("_A0dA$", model) ~ "A0dA",
      grepl("_gamm$", model) ~ "GAMM", 
      grepl("_ranef$", model) ~ "ranef", 
    ),
    Measure = case_when(
      grepl("^m_Thickness", model) ~ "Thickness",
      grepl("^m_Area", model)      ~ "Area"
    ),
    stat = sprintf("%.2f, η² = %.2f, p = %.3f", beta, eta2, p),
    stat = sub("p = 0\\.", "p = .", stat)
  ) %>%
  select(Adjustment, Measure, stat) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Measure, values_from = stat) %>%
  arrange(factor(Adjustment, levels = c("A0", "A0dA", "GAMM")))

steiger_table <- tibble(
  Adjustment = c("A0", "A0dA", "GAMM", "ranef"),
  adj_suffix = c("A0", "A0dA", "gamm", "ranef")
) %>%
  rowwise() %>% mutate(
    steiger = list({
      y  <- HABS_slopes[[paste0("gCog_slope_", adj_suffix)]]
      x1 <- HABS_slopes[[paste0("Thickness_slope_", adj_suffix)]]
      x2 <- HABS_slopes[[paste0("Area_slope_", adj_suffix)]]
      ok <- complete.cases(y, x1, x2)
      ct <- cocor.dep.groups.overlap(
        r.jk = cor(y[ok], x1[ok]),
        r.jh = cor(y[ok], x2[ok]),
        r.kh = cor(x1[ok], x2[ok]),
        n    = sum(ok), alternative = "two.sided")
      tibble(
        z_steiger = sprintf("%.2f", ct@steiger1980$statistic),
        p_steiger = sub("^0\\.", ".", sprintf("%.3f", ct@steiger1980$p.value)),
        n = sum(ok))
    })
  ) %>% unnest(steiger) %>% select(-adj_suffix)
final_table_all <- final_table %>% left_join(steiger_table, by = "Adjustment")
final_table_all %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Model Results",
    subtitle = "Thickness, Area, and Steiger Comparisons"
  ) %>%
  fmt_markdown(everything()) %>%
  opt_table_outline() %>%
  opt_all_caps()
```
###Diagnostic chunk 
```{r}
diag_df <- HABS_slopes %>%
  select(
    Med_ID,
    gCog_A0    = gCog_slope_A0,
    gCog_ranef = gCog_slope_ranef,
    Thk_A0     = Thickness_slope_A0,
    Thk_ranef  = Thickness_slope_ranef,
    Area_A0    = Area_slope_A0,
    Area_ranef = Area_slope_ranef,
    Ethnicity,
    Sex,
    A0
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    mydata_long %>%
      group_by(Med_ID) %>%
      summarise(
        n_visits = n(),
        dA_range = diff(range(dA, na.rm = TRUE)),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "Med_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    abs_diff_gCog = abs(gCog_ranef - gCog_A0),
    abs_diff_Thk  = abs(Thk_ranef  - Thk_A0),
    abs_diff_Area = abs(Area_ranef - Area_A0)
  )

summary(lm(abs_diff_gCog ~ n_visits + dA_range + Ethnicity + Sex + A0, data = diag_df))
summary(lm(abs_diff_Thk ~ n_visits + dA_range + Ethnicity + Sex + A0, data = diag_df))
summary(lm(abs_diff_Area ~ n_visits + dA_range + Ethnicity + Sex + A0, data = diag_df))
```
## ROI models 
```{r}
roi_cols <- grep("^(?!(Thickness|Area|gCog)).*_slope_A0$",names(HABS_slopes),
                 value = TRUE, perl = TRUE)

roi_meta <- data.frame(col=roi_cols,
            region  = sub("^(.*)_(thickness|area)_slope_A0$", "\\1",roi_cols),
            measure = sub("^.*_(thickness|area)_slope_A0$", "\\1", roi_cols),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

roi_long <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(roi_meta)), function(i) {
  cl <- roi_meta$col[i]
  df <- data.frame(
    ROI     = HABS_slopes[[cl]],
    gCog    = HABS_slopes$gCog_slope_A0
  )
  df <- df[complete.cases(df), ]
  sm <- summary(lm(gCog ~ ROI, data = df))$coefficients["ROI", ]
  data.frame(
    region  = roi_meta$region[i],
    measure = roi_meta$measure[i],
    beta    = round(sm["Estimate"], 2),
    p       = sm["Pr(>|t|)"],   
    n       = nrow(df),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

roi_long$p_fdr <- ave(roi_long$p, roi_long$measure, FUN = function(x) p.adjust(x, method = "fdr"))
roi_table <- reshape(roi_long, idvar = "region",timevar = "measure", direction = "wide")
p_cols <- grep("^p(\\.|_fdr\\.)", names(roi_table), value = TRUE)
roi_table[p_cols] <- lapply(roi_table[p_cols],function(x) sub("^0\\.", ".", sprintf("%.3f", x)))
roi_table %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "ROI Model Results",
    subtitle = "Thickness by ROI"
  ) %>%
  fmt_markdown(everything()) %>%
  opt_table_outline() %>%
  opt_all_caps()

roi_long$sig <- roi_long$p_fdr < 0.05
roi_long$region <- factor(
  roi_long$region,
  levels = rev(unique(roi_long$region))
)
ggplot(roi_long, aes(x = beta, y = region, color = measure, shape = sig)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 1, `TRUE` = 16)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(thickness = "darkorange", area = "turquoise3")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.30, 0.30)) +
  labs(title = "HABS-HD", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# ggplot(roi_long, aes(x = beta, y = region, color = measure, shape = sig)) +
#   geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
#   geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.6), size = 2.5) +
#   scale_color_manual(name = "Cortical measure", values = c(area = "turquoise3", thickness = "darkorange"), labels = c(area = "SA", thickness = "THK")) +
#   scale_shape_manual(name = "FDR-adjusted significance", values = c(`FALSE` = 1, `TRUE` = 16), labels = c("Not significant", "q < 0.05")) +
#   theme_bw() +
#   theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "top", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

ggsave("Figures/ROI_effects_long.png", width = 3, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```
## Full models with baselines 
```{r}
HABS_slopes$Thickness_baseline <- scale(HABS_slopes$Thickness_baseline)
HABS_slopes$Area_baseline <- scale(HABS_slopes$Area_baseline)

models_sb <- lapply(adjustments, function(adj) {
  yvar <- paste0("gCog_slope_", adj)
  x_th <- paste0("Thickness_slope_", adj)
  x_ar <- paste0("Area_slope_", adj)
  b_th <- paste0("Thickness_baseline")
  b_ar <- paste0("Area_baseline")
  fml <- as.formula(
    paste(yvar, "~", x_th, "+", x_ar, "+", b_th, "+", b_ar)
  )
  lm(fml, data = HABS_slopes)
})
names(models_sb) <- paste0("m2_", adjustments)

results <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(names(models_sb), function(nm) {
    m  <- models_sb[[nm]]
    sm <- summary(m)$coefficients
    eta <- eta_squared(m, partial = TRUE)
    as.data.frame(sm) %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("predictor") %>%
      left_join(
        eta %>%
          select(Parameter, Eta2_partial),
        by = c("predictor" = "Parameter")
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        model     = nm,
        predictor = predictor,
        beta      = Estimate,
        p         = `Pr(>|t|)`,
        eta2      = Eta2_partial
      )
  })
)

results <- results %>% filter(grepl("Thickness_slope_.*|Area_slope_.*|Thickness_baseline|Area_baseline", predictor))

wide_models <- results %>%
  mutate(
    Adjustment = case_when(
      grepl("^m2_A0$", model)   ~ "A0",
      grepl("^m2_A0dA$", model) ~ "A0dA",
      grepl("^m2_gamm$", model) ~ "GAMM", 
      grepl("^m2_ranef$", model) ~ "ranef", 
    ),
    Predictor_clean = case_when(
      grepl("Thickness_slope_.*", predictor) ~ "Thickness_slope",
      grepl("Area_slope_.*", predictor)      ~ "Area_slope",
      grepl("Thickness_baseline", predictor) ~ "Thickness_baseline",
      grepl("Area_baseline", predictor)      ~ "Area_baseline"
    ),
    beta_r = round(beta, 2),
    eta_r  = round(eta2, 2),
    p_r    = round(p, 3),
    stat   = paste0(beta_r, ", η² = ", eta_r, ", p = ", sub("^0\\.", ".", p_r))
  ) %>%
  select(Adjustment, Predictor_clean, stat) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Predictor_clean,
    values_from = stat
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(Adjustment, levels = c("A0", "A0dA", "GAMM"))) %>%
  select(
    Adjustment,
    Thickness_slope,
    Area_slope,
    Thickness_baseline,
    Area_baseline
  )

extract_lh <- function(mod, hyp) {
  ct <- as.data.frame(linearHypothesis(mod, hyp))
  row <- ct[2, , drop = FALSE]
  
  stat_col <- intersect(c("Chisq", "F"), names(row))[1]
  p_col    <- intersect(c("Pr(>Chisq)", "Pr(>F)"), names(row))[1]
  
  stat_val <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(row[[stat_col]]))
  p_val    <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(row[[p_col]]))
  tibble(stat_type = stat_col, stat = round(stat_val, 2), p_lh = sub("^0\\.", ".", sprintf("%.3f", p_val)))
}

lh_table <- tibble(
  Adjustment = c("A0", "A0dA", "GAMM"),
  model_name = c("m2_A0", "m2_A0dA", "m2_gamm"),
  contrast   = c(
    "Thickness_slope_A0 - Area_slope_A0 = 0",
    "Thickness_slope_A0dA - Area_slope_A0dA = 0",
    "Thickness_slope_gamm - Area_slope_gamm = 0"
  )
) %>%
  mutate(out = pmap(list(model_name, contrast), \(mn, h) extract_lh(models_sb[[mn]], h))) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(out) %>%
  select(-model_name, -contrast)

final_models_table <- wide_models %>% left_join(lh_table, by = "Adjustment")
final_models_table %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Slope + Baseline Results",
    subtitle = "Thickness, Area"
  ) %>%
  fmt_markdown(everything()) %>%
  opt_table_outline() %>%
  opt_all_caps()
```

```{r}
set.seed(716)
# sample_ids <- sample(unique(mydata_long$Med_ID), 500)
# sample_data <- subset(mydata_long, Med_ID %in% sample_ids)

# thickness_change_plot <- plotit(mydata_long, "Age", "Thickness",
#                                 "Age", "Thickness",
#                                  min(mydata_long$Thickness), max(mydata_long$Thickness), "darkorange")
# area_change_plot <- plotit(mydata_long, "Age", "Area",
#                                 "Age", "Area",
#                                 min(mydata_long$Area), max(mydata_long$Area), "turquoise4")

thickness_change_plot2 <- plotit2(mydata_long, "Age", "Thickness",
                                 "Age", "THK (mm)",
                                 min(mydata_long$Thickness),max(mydata_long$Thickness),"darkorange")

area_change_plot2 <- plotit2(mydata_long, "Age", "Area",
                                 "Age", "SA (mm²)",
                                 min(mydata_long$Area),max(mydata_long$Area),"turquoise4")

png("Figures/THK_SA_age_HABS.png", width = 16, height = 8, units = "in", res = 300)
grid.arrange(thickness_change_plot2, area_change_plot2, ncol = 2)
dev.off()

gm_plot <- mydata_long %>%
  select(Med_ID, Age, Thickness, Area) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Thickness, Area),
    names_to = "measure",
    values_to = "value"
  )
gm_plot <- gm_plot %>%
  group_by(measure) %>%
  mutate(
    value_z = as.numeric(scale(value))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(gm_plot, aes(Age, value_z, color = measure)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Med_ID, measure)), alpha = 0.1, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 5), se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Thickness" = "darkorange","Area" = "turquoise4")) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-6, 2.5), xlim = c(18, 100)) +   # ← SET MIN / MAX HERE
  labs(x = "Age", y = "z-score", title = NULL, color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16))
ggsave(filename = "Figures/GAMM_age_HABS.png", width = 8, height = 8, units = "in", bg = "white", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
mydata_growth <- mydata_slopes[!is.na(mydata_slopes$Thickness0) & !is.na(mydata_slopes$Thickness1) &
                               !is.na(mydata_slopes$Thickness2) &
                               !is.na(mydata_slopes$Area0) & !is.na(mydata_slopes$Area1) &
                               !is.na(mydata_slopes$Area2), ]

cols_to_scale <- c("Thickness0", "Thickness1", "Thickness2", "Area0", "Area1", "Area2", 
                   "gCog0", "gCog1", "gCog2")
mydata_growth[cols_to_scale] <- scale(mydata_growth[cols_to_scale])

BLCS_thickness <-'
Thickness2 ~ 1*Thickness0
dThickness =~ 1*Thickness2
Thickness2 ~ 0*1
Thickness2 ~~ 0*Thickness2

gCog2 ~ 1*gCog0
dgCog =~ 1*gCog2
dgCog ~ 1
gCog0 ~  1
gCog2 ~ 0*1

dgCog ~~  dgCog
gCog0 ~~   gCog0
gCog2 ~~ 0*gCog2

dThickness ~ 1
Thickness0 ~ 1
dThickness ~~ dThickness
Thickness0 ~~ Thickness0

dThickness~gCog0+Thickness0
dgCog~Thickness0+gCog0

gCog0 ~~  Thickness0
dgCog ~~ dThickness
'
fitBLCS_thickness <- lavaan(BLCS_thickness, data=mydata_growth, estimator='mlr',fixed.x=TRUE,missing='fiml')
summary(fitBLCS_thickness, fit.measures=TRUE, standardized=TRUE, rsquare=TRUE)

thickness_plot <- semPlot::semPaths(fitBLCS_thickness,
                  whatLabels = "std",
                  layout = "tree",
                  rotation = 2,
                  edge.label.cex = 1.5,
                  label.cex = 1.2,
                  sizeMan = 9,
                  sizeLat = 9,
                  nCharNodes = 3,
                  intercepts = FALSE,
                  residuals = FALSE,
                  edge.color = "black")

thickness_plot <- mark_sig(thickness_plot, fitBLCS_thickness)
plot(thickness_plot)

BLCS_thickness_A0 <-'
Thickness2 ~ 1*Thickness0
dThickness =~ 1*Thickness2
Thickness2 ~ 0*1
Thickness2 ~~ 0*Thickness2

gCog2 ~ 1*gCog0
dgCog =~ 1*gCog2
dgCog ~ 1
gCog0 ~  1
gCog2 ~ 0*1

dgCog ~~  dgCog
gCog0 ~~   gCog0
gCog2 ~~ 0*gCog2

dThickness ~ 1
Thickness0 ~ 1
dThickness ~~ dThickness
Thickness0 ~~ Thickness0

dThickness~gCog0+Thickness0
dgCog~Thickness0+gCog0

gCog0 ~~  Thickness0
dgCog ~~ dThickness

dThickness ~ A0
dgCog      ~ A0
'
fitBLCS_thickness_A0 <- lavaan(BLCS_thickness_A0, data=mydata_growth, estimator='mlr',fixed.x=TRUE,missing='fiml')
summary(fitBLCS_thickness_A0, fit.measures=TRUE, standardized=TRUE, rsquare=TRUE)
```

```{r}
BLCS_area <-'
Area2 ~ 1*Area0
dArea =~ 1*Area2
Area2 ~ 0*1
Area2 ~~ 0*Area2

gCog2 ~ 1*gCog0
dgCog =~ 1*gCog2
dgCog ~ 1
gCog0 ~  1
gCog2 ~ 0*1

dgCog ~~  dgCog
gCog0 ~~   gCog0
gCog2 ~~ 0*gCog2

dArea ~ 1
Area0 ~ 1
dArea ~~ dArea
Area0 ~~ Area0

dArea~gCog0+Area0
dgCog~Area0+gCog0

gCog0 ~~  Area0
dgCog ~~ dArea
'
fitBLCS_area <- lavaan(BLCS_area, data=mydata_growth, estimator='mlr',fixed.x=TRUE,missing='fiml')
summary(fitBLCS_area, fit.measures=TRUE, standardized=TRUE, rsquare=TRUE)

area_plot <- semPlot::semPaths(fitBLCS_area,
                  whatLabels = "std",
                  layout = "tree",
                  rotation = 2,
                  edge.label.cex = 1.5,
                  label.cex = 1.2,
                  sizeMan = 9,
                  sizeLat = 9,
                  nCharNodes = 3,
                  intercepts = FALSE,
                  residuals = FALSE,
                  edge.color = "black")

area_plot <- mark_sig(area_plot, fitBLCS_area)
plot(area_plot)

BLCS_area_A0 <-'
Area2 ~ 1*Area0
dArea =~ 1*Area2
Area2 ~ 0*1
Area2 ~~ 0*Area2

gCog2 ~ 1*gCog0
dgCog =~ 1*gCog2
dgCog ~ 1
gCog0 ~  1
gCog2 ~ 0*1

dgCog ~~  dgCog
gCog0 ~~   gCog0
gCog2 ~~ 0*gCog2

dArea ~ 1
Area0 ~ 1
dArea ~~ dArea
Area0 ~~ Area0

dArea~gCog0+Area0
dgCog~Area0+gCog0

gCog0 ~~  Area0
dgCog ~~ dArea

dArea ~ A0 
dgCog ~ A0 
'
fitBLCS_area_A0 <- lavaan(BLCS_area_A0, data=mydata_growth, estimator='mlr',fixed.x=TRUE,missing='fiml')
summary(fitBLCS_area_A0, fit.measures=TRUE, standardized=TRUE, rsquare=TRUE)
```

```{r}
# bad_ids <- mydata_long$Med_ID[mydata_long$dA >= 2.5 & mydata_long$dA <= 3.5 |
#                               mydata_long$dA >= 5 & mydata_long$dA <= 6]
# 
# mydata_filtered <- subset(mydata_growth, !(Med_ID %in% bad_ids))

plot(mydata_long$dA, mydata_long$Med_ID, 
     xlab = "dA", ylab = "Med_ID", 
     pch = 19, col = "blue")

lgm_model_thick <- '

  i_gCog =~ 1*gCog0 + 1*gCog1 + 1*gCog2 
  s_gCog =~ 0*gCog0 + 1*gCog1 + 2*gCog2 
  
  i_Thick =~ 1*Thickness0 + 1*Thickness1 + 1*Thickness2 
  s_Thick =~ 0*Thickness0 + 1*Thickness1 + 2*Thickness2 

  i_gCog ~ 1
  s_gCog ~ 1
  
  i_Thick ~ 1
  s_Thick ~ 1

  i_gCog ~~ i_Thick
  s_gCog ~~ s_Thick
  s_Thick ~ i_gCog 
  s_gCog ~ i_Thick

  gCog0 ~~ 0.01*gCog0
  gCog1 ~~ 0.01*gCog1
  gCog2 ~~ 0.01*gCog2
  
  Thickness0 ~~ 0.01*Thickness0
  Thickness1 ~~ 0.01*Thickness1
  Thickness2 ~~ 0.01*Thickness2
  
'

fit_lgm_thick <- growth(lgm_model_thick, data = mydata_growth, missing = "fiml")
summary(fit_lgm_thick, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE, rsquare = TRUE)

colMeans(is.na(mydata_growth[, c("Thickness0", "Thickness1", "Thickness2")]))
param_est <- parameterEstimates(fit_lgm_thick, standardized=TRUE)
param_edges <- param_est[param_est$op %in% c("=~", "~", "~~"), ]

param_edges$pvalue[is.na(param_edges$pvalue)] <- 1
edge_colors <- ifelse(param_edges$pvalue < 0.05, "black", "lightgrey")

edge_labels <- round(param_edges$std.all, 2)
semPaths(fit_lgm_thick,
         whatLabels = "none",  
         edgeLabels = as.character(edge_labels),  
         edge.color = edge_colors,
         layout = "tree",
         rotation = 1,
         edge.label.cex = 0.8,
         edge.label.position = 0.6,
         sizeMan = 6,
         sizeLat = 7,
         esize = 1,
         curve = 1,
         intercepts = FALSE,
         residuals = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
lgm_model_area <- '

  i_gCog =~ 1*gCog0 + 1*gCog1 + 1*gCog2 
  s_gCog =~ 0*gCog0 + 1*gCog1 + 2*gCog2 
  
  i_Area =~ 1*Area0 + 1*Area1 + 1*Area2 
  s_Area =~ 0*Area0 + 1*Area1 + 2*Area2 

  i_gCog ~ 1
  s_gCog ~ 1
  
  i_Area ~ 1
  s_Area ~ 1

  i_gCog ~~ i_Area
  s_gCog ~~ s_Area
  s_Area ~ i_gCog
  s_gCog ~ i_Area

  gCog0 ~~ 0.01*gCog0
  gCog1 ~~ 0.01*gCog1
  gCog2 ~~ 0.01*gCog2
  
  Area0 ~~ 0.01*Area0
  Area1 ~~ 0.01*Area1
  Area2 ~~ 0.01*Area2

'

fit_lgm_area <- growth(lgm_model_area, data=mydata_growth, missing = "fiml")
summary(fit_lgm_area, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE, rsquare = TRUE)

param_est <- parameterEstimates(fit_lgm_area, standardized=TRUE)
param_edges <- param_est[param_est$op %in% c("=~", "~", "~~"), ]

param_edges$pvalue[is.na(param_edges$pvalue)] <- 1
edge_colors <- ifelse(param_edges$pvalue < 0.05, "black", "lightgrey")

edge_labels <- round(param_edges$std.all, 2)
semPaths(fit_lgm_area,
         whatLabels = "none",  
         edgeLabels = as.character(edge_labels),  
         edge.color = edge_colors,
         layout = "tree",
         rotation = 1,
         edge.label.cex = 0.8,
         edge.label.position = 0.6,
         sizeMan = 6,
         sizeLat = 7,
         esize = 1,
         curve = 1,
         intercepts = FALSE,
         residuals = TRUE
)
```
